home.title: QuoteKeeper
home.tagline: Capture and save your favorite quotes
home.description: Take photos of text from books, crop the image, and automatically extract the quotes you want to remember. All from your browser.

capture.title: Capture
capture.description: Use your camera to photograph text

crop.title: Crop
crop.description: Select the exact fragment you want

quotes.title: My Quotes
quotes.noQuotesDescription: Start capturing quotes from your favorite books!
quotes.confirmDeleteAll: Are you sure you want to delete all your quotes? This action cannot be undone.

profile.title: Profile

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name

quotes.defaultVisibilityHelp: New quotes will be set as {visibility} by default.

createProfile.title: Create Your Profile
createProfile.subtitle: Complete your profile to get started with QuoteKeeper
createProfile.profilePictureHelp: Upload a profile picture (this is a placeholder for now)
createProfile.emailHelp: Your email from the authentication token
createProfile.name: Name
createProfile.nameHelp: This will be your display name
createProfile.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
createProfile.nameMaxLength: Name must be less than 50 characters

capture.title: Capture a Quote
capture.subtitle: Take photos or upload images of text from books
capture.ocrError: Failed to extract text from images
capture.tip1: Ensure good lighting and minimal shadows
capture.tip2: Keep the camera steady and focus on the text
capture.tip3: Capture text at a straight angle when possible
capture.tip4: You can upload multiple images at once

quote.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this quote?

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

quotesManager.clearSearch: Clear search and show all quotes
quotesManager.limitWarning: Showing the maximum of 50 results. Try refining your search for more specific results.
quotesManager.deleteConfirmation: This action is irreversible. The quote will be permanently deleted.
quotesManager.deleteConfirmationPlural: This action is irreversible. The selected quotes will be permanently deleted.
quotesManager.deleteError: Failed to delete quotes. Please try again.
quotesManager.updateError: Failed to update quote. Please try again.
